suites.title: Assignment completion and approval workflow
suites.description: Test cases for the end-to-end lifecycle of an interview: from assignment creation through interviewer completion, supervisor review, and HQ/Admin final approval.

suites.title: Interviewer completes an interview
suites.description: Covers the action of an interviewer submitting a completed interview from the mobile Interviewer application.
suites.preconditions:
1. A Headquarters user has created an assignment and assigned it to an interviewer.
2. The interviewer has synchronized the app and the assignment is visible on their dashboard.
3. The interviewer has opened/started the interview.

cases.title: Interviewer completes an interview with no issues
cases.description: Verify that an interviewer can successfully complete an interview when all mandatory questions are answered and no validation errors exist.
cases.preconditions:
1. Interviewer has answered all mandatory questions.
2. No validation errors are present.
3. Interviewer navigates to the Complete screen.
cases.postconditions: Interview status changes to 'Completed' and the interview is no longer available for editing by the interviewer.

steps.action: Open the interview and navigate to the Complete screen (tap the Complete button or navigate to the last section).
steps.expected_result: Complete screen is displayed showing interview statistics (answered/unanswered question counts) and a green 'Complete' button.

steps.action: Tap the 'Complete' button.
steps.expected_result: Interview is submitted successfully. The interviewer is returned to the dashboard. The interview card shows status 'Completed'.

steps.action: Synchronize the app with the server.
steps.expected_result: The interview is sent to the server. On the HQ dashboard the interview appears in the interview list with status 'Completed'.

cases.title: Interviewer completes an interview with unanswered questions
cases.description: Verify that an interviewer can complete an interview that still has unanswered non-mandatory questions, and that the Complete screen correctly reports the unanswered count.
cases.preconditions:
1. At least one non-mandatory question is intentionally left unanswered.
2. No validation errors are present.
3. Interviewer navigates to the Complete screen.
cases.postconditions: Interview is submitted with status 'Completed'.

steps.action: Navigate to the Complete screen.
steps.expected_result: Complete screen shows the correct number of unanswered questions under the 'Unanswered' tab. The 'Complete' button is available (blue/primary style).

steps.action: Tap the 'Complete' button without answering the remaining optional questions.
steps.expected_result: Interview is submitted. Interviewer returns to dashboard. Interview card shows status 'Completed'.

cases.title: Interviewer completes an interview with critical errors — confirmation required
cases.description: Verify that when the questionnaire supports criticality and the interview has critical issues (unanswered critical questions or broken critical rules), the interviewer is shown a confirmation dialog before completing.
cases.preconditions:
1. The questionnaire has criticality support enabled.
2. At least one critical issue (unanswered critical question or failed critical validation rule) exists.
3. Interviewer navigates to the Complete screen.
cases.postconditions: If confirmed, interview is submitted with status 'Completed'. If declined, interview remains open.

steps.action: Navigate to the Complete screen.
steps.expected_result: Complete screen shows critical errors in the 'Critical errors' tab. The 'Complete' button is available (red/danger style).

steps.action: Tap the 'Complete' button.
steps.expected_result: A confirmation dialog is displayed asking the interviewer to confirm completing with critical issues.

steps.action: Tap 'No' on the confirmation dialog.
steps.expected_result: Dialog closes. Interviewer remains on the Complete screen. Interview is NOT submitted.

steps.action: Tap the 'Complete' button again, then tap 'Yes' on the confirmation dialog.
steps.expected_result: Interview is submitted with status 'Completed'. Interviewer returns to dashboard.

cases.title: Interviewer completes an interview with a comment
cases.description: Verify that an interviewer can enter a completion comment, and that the comment is visible to the supervisor and HQ after submission.
cases.preconditions:
1. Interviewer has answered all required questions.
2. Interviewer navigates to the Complete screen.
cases.postconditions: Interview is submitted with the comment stored and visible in the interview history.

steps.action: Navigate to the Complete screen.
steps.expected_result: A comment text field is available on the Complete screen.

steps.action: Enter a comment in the comment field, then tap 'Complete'.
steps.expected_result: Interview is submitted. Comment is saved.

steps.action: Synchronize and log in as Supervisor. Open the completed interview.
steps.expected_result: The comment entered by the interviewer is visible in the interview details/history.

suites.title: Supervisor reviews completed interviews
suites.description: Covers supervisor actions — approve, reject, and assign — on interviews that have been completed by interviewers and synchronized to the server.
suites.preconditions:
1. At least one interview with status 'Completed' (or 'RejectedByHeadquarters') exists and is assigned to the supervisor's team.
2. Supervisor is logged in to the Supervisor app or HQ web interface.

cases.title: Supervisor views completed interviews on dashboard
cases.description: Verify that a supervisor can see completed interviews on their dashboard and they are correctly labeled.
cases.preconditions:
1. At least one interview with status 'Completed' belongs to the supervisor's team.
2. Supervisor is logged in to the Supervisor app.

steps.action: Open the Supervisor app and navigate to the Interviews list.
steps.expected_result: Completed interviews are listed and show status 'Completed'. Actions 'Approve' and 'Reject' are available in the context menu for each completed interview.

steps.action: Open a completed interview to review its content.
steps.expected_result: Interview opens in read-only mode. The supervisor can navigate through all sections and view all answers.

cases.title: Supervisor approves a completed interview
cases.description: Verify that a supervisor can approve a completed interview and the interview status changes to 'ApprovedBySupervisor'.
cases.preconditions:
1. An interview with status 'Completed' is assigned to the supervisor's team.
2. Supervisor is logged in.
cases.postconditions: Interview status changes to 'ApprovedBySupervisor'. Interview is no longer shown in the supervisor's active queue. HQ/Admin can see it as 'ApprovedBySupervisor'.

steps.action: Navigate to the interviews list and find a completed interview. Tap the context menu and select 'Approve'.
steps.expected_result: An approval confirmation dialog is shown.

steps.action: Optionally add a comment and confirm the approval.
steps.expected_result: Interview status changes to 'ApprovedBySupervisor'. The interview is removed from the active supervisor queue (or shown in 'ApprovedBySupervisor' filter).

steps.action: On the HQ web interface, filter interviews by status 'ApprovedBySupervisor'.
steps.expected_result: The interview appears in the list with status 'ApprovedBySupervisor'. The HQ 'Approve' button is enabled for this interview.

cases.title: Supervisor rejects a completed interview back to the interviewer
cases.description: Verify that a supervisor can reject a completed interview, and it is returned to the interviewer with a rejection comment.
cases.preconditions:
1. An interview with status 'Completed' is assigned to the supervisor's team.
2. Supervisor is logged in.
cases.postconditions: Interview status changes to 'RejectedBySupervisor'. The responsible interviewer receives the interview on their next sync for re-work.

steps.action: Navigate to the interviews list and find a completed interview. Tap the context menu and select 'Reject'.
steps.expected_result: A rejection dialog is shown with a comment field.

steps.action: Enter a rejection reason in the comment field and confirm the rejection.
steps.expected_result: Interview status changes to 'RejectedBySupervisor'. The rejection comment is saved.

steps.action: Interviewer synchronizes their app.
steps.expected_result: The rejected interview appears on the interviewer's dashboard with status 'Rejected'. The supervisor's rejection comment is visible to the interviewer.

steps.action: Interviewer makes the necessary corrections and re-completes the interview, then syncs again.
steps.expected_result: Interview status changes back to 'Completed' on the server. The supervisor can see it as 'Completed' and can act on it again.

cases.title: Supervisor approves an interview in RejectedByHeadquarters status
cases.description: Verify that a supervisor can approve an interview that was rejected by HQ (sent back to the supervisor), changing its status to 'ApprovedBySupervisor'.
cases.preconditions:
1. An interview exists with status 'RejectedByHeadquarters'.
2. The interview is visible to the supervisor.
cases.postconditions: Interview status changes to 'ApprovedBySupervisor'.

steps.action: Find an interview with status 'RejectedByHeadquarters' in the interviews list. Check the available context menu actions.
steps.expected_result: 'Approve' and 'Reject' actions are available in the context menu.

steps.action: Tap 'Approve' and confirm.
steps.expected_result: Interview status changes to 'ApprovedBySupervisor'. It is available for final HQ approval.

cases.title: Supervisor rejects an interview in RejectedByHeadquarters status
cases.description: Verify that a supervisor can reject an interview that was rejected by HQ, sending it back to the interviewer.
cases.preconditions:
1. An interview exists with status 'RejectedByHeadquarters'.
2. Supervisor is logged in.
cases.postconditions: Interview status changes to 'RejectedBySupervisor'. The interview is sent back to the interviewer.

steps.action: Find an interview with status 'RejectedByHeadquarters'. Open the context menu.
steps.expected_result: 'Approve' and 'Reject' options are available.

steps.action: Tap 'Reject', enter a comment, and confirm.
steps.expected_result: Interview status changes to 'RejectedBySupervisor'. The interview is pushed to the interviewer on next sync.

suites.title: HQ/Admin approves and rejects interviews
suites.description: Covers HQ/Administrator actions on interviews — final approval, rejection (to supervisor or to interviewer), and unapproval from the web interface.
suites.preconditions:
1. At least one interview exists with status 'Completed', 'ApprovedBySupervisor', or 'RejectedBySupervisor'.
2. HQ or Admin user is logged in to the web interface.

cases.title: HQ approves a completed interview
cases.description: Verify that an HQ user can approve an interview in 'Completed' status, changing it to 'ApprovedByHeadquarters'.
cases.preconditions:
1. An interview with status 'Completed' exists.
2. HQ user is logged in.
cases.postconditions: Interview status changes to 'ApprovedByHeadquarters'. The interview can no longer be rejected without unapproving first.

steps.action: Open the Interviews list on the HQ web interface. Filter by status 'Completed'. Select the interview and click 'Approve'.
steps.expected_result: Confirmation dialog is shown.

steps.action: Confirm the approval (optionally add a comment).
steps.expected_result: Interview status changes to 'ApprovedByHeadquarters'. The 'Approve' button is no longer available. The 'Unapprove' button appears.

cases.title: HQ approves a supervisor-approved interview
cases.description: Verify that an HQ user can approve an interview in 'ApprovedBySupervisor' status.
cases.preconditions:
1. An interview with status 'ApprovedBySupervisor' exists.
2. HQ user is logged in.
cases.postconditions: Interview status changes to 'ApprovedByHeadquarters'.

steps.action: Open the Interviews list. Filter by status 'ApprovedBySupervisor'. Select the interview and click 'Approve'.
steps.expected_result: Confirmation dialog is shown.

steps.action: Confirm the approval.
steps.expected_result: Interview status changes to 'ApprovedByHeadquarters'.

cases.title: HQ approves an interview in RejectedBySupervisor status
cases.description: Verify that an HQ user can approve an interview in 'RejectedBySupervisor' status (bypassing the supervisor), changing it directly to 'ApprovedByHeadquarters'.
cases.preconditions:
1. An interview with status 'RejectedBySupervisor' exists that has NOT yet been received by the interviewer (not downloaded).
2. HQ user is logged in.
cases.postconditions: Interview status changes to 'ApprovedByHeadquarters'.

steps.action: Find an interview with status 'RejectedBySupervisor' that the interviewer has not yet received. Click 'Approve' on the interview detail page.
steps.expected_result: Confirmation dialog is shown. The 'Approve' button is enabled for this status.

steps.action: Confirm the approval.
steps.expected_result: Interview status changes to 'ApprovedByHeadquarters'.

cases.title: HQ rejects a completed interview to the original interviewer
cases.description: Verify that an HQ user can reject a completed interview directly back to the original interviewer, bypassing the supervisor.
cases.preconditions:
1. An interview with status 'Completed' exists.
2. HQ user is logged in.
cases.postconditions: Interview status changes to 'RejectedBySupervisor'. The interview is sent back to the original interviewer.

steps.action: Open a 'Completed' interview on the HQ web interface and click 'Reject'.
steps.expected_result: A rejection dialog is shown with options: reject to original responsible, or reject to a new responsible.

steps.action: Select 'Reject to original responsible' and enter a rejection comment, then confirm.
steps.expected_result: Interview status changes to 'RejectedBySupervisor'. The interview is assigned back to the original interviewer. The rejection comment is visible.

steps.action: Interviewer synchronizes the app.
steps.expected_result: The rejected interview appears on the interviewer's dashboard with status 'Rejected' and the HQ comment is visible.

cases.title: HQ rejects a completed interview to the supervisor
cases.description: Verify that an HQ user can reject a completed interview to the supervisor's queue (RejectedByHeadquarters) instead of sending it directly back to the interviewer.
cases.preconditions:
1. An interview with status 'Completed' exists.
2. HQ user is logged in.
cases.postconditions: Interview status changes to 'RejectedByHeadquarters'. The supervisor sees it in their queue.

steps.action: Open a 'Completed' interview on the HQ web interface and click 'Reject'.
steps.expected_result: A rejection dialog appears with options to select a responsible.

steps.action: Select 'Reject to new responsible', choose the supervisor as the new responsible, enter a comment, and confirm.
steps.expected_result: Interview status changes to 'RejectedByHeadquarters'. The interview is assigned to the selected supervisor.

steps.action: Log in as the supervisor and check the interviews list.
steps.expected_result: The interview with status 'RejectedByHeadquarters' appears in the supervisor's dashboard. The supervisor can approve or reject it.

cases.title: HQ rejects a supervisor-approved interview
cases.description: Verify that an HQ user can reject an interview in 'ApprovedBySupervisor' status, sending it back for further review.
cases.preconditions:
1. An interview with status 'ApprovedBySupervisor' exists.
2. HQ user is logged in.
cases.postconditions: Interview status changes to 'RejectedByHeadquarters' or 'RejectedBySupervisor' depending on the target responsible.

steps.action: Find an interview with status 'ApprovedBySupervisor' and click 'Reject'.
steps.expected_result: Rejection dialog is shown with an option to select the target responsible.

steps.action: Select reject to the supervisor and confirm with a comment.
steps.expected_result: Interview status changes to 'RejectedByHeadquarters'. The supervisor sees it in their queue.

cases.title: HQ unapproves an HQ-approved interview
cases.description: Verify that an HQ user can unapprove an interview that has already been approved by HQ, reverting it to allow re-evaluation.
cases.preconditions:
1. An interview with status 'ApprovedByHeadquarters' exists.
2. HQ user is logged in.
cases.postconditions: Interview status reverts. The 'Approve' and 'Reject' buttons become available again.

steps.action: Filter the interviews list by status 'ApprovedByHeadquarters'. Open an approved interview.
steps.expected_result: The 'Unapprove' button is visible. The 'Approve' and 'Reject' buttons are NOT available (already approved).

steps.action: Click 'Unapprove' and confirm.
steps.expected_result: Interview status is no longer 'ApprovedByHeadquarters'. The 'Approve' and 'Reject' buttons become available. The 'Unapprove' button is no longer available.

cases.title: HQ cannot approve or reject an already HQ-approved interview
cases.description: Verify that the Approve and Reject buttons are disabled/hidden for an interview that already has status 'ApprovedByHeadquarters'.
cases.preconditions:
1. An interview with status 'ApprovedByHeadquarters' exists.
2. HQ user is logged in.

steps.action: Open an interview with status 'ApprovedByHeadquarters' on the HQ web interface.
steps.expected_result: 'Approve' and 'Reject' buttons are not available (hidden or disabled). Only 'Unapprove' is available.

cases.title: Supervisor cannot approve or reject an HQ-approved interview
cases.description: Verify that a supervisor cannot approve or reject an interview that has been approved by HQ.
cases.preconditions:
1. An interview with status 'ApprovedByHeadquarters' exists.
2. Supervisor is logged in.

steps.action: Log in as a Supervisor. Find an interview with status 'ApprovedByHeadquarters' in the interviews list.
steps.expected_result: 'Approve' and 'Reject' actions are NOT available in the context menu. The interview is read-only.

suites.title: Bulk approve and reject operations
suites.description: Covers bulk approve and reject actions performed on multiple interviews simultaneously from the HQ or Supervisor web interface.
suites.preconditions:
1. Multiple interviews in actionable statuses exist.
2. HQ or Supervisor user is logged in to the web interface.

cases.title: Supervisor bulk approves multiple completed interviews
cases.description: Verify that a supervisor can select and approve multiple completed interviews at once from the HQ web interface.
cases.preconditions:
1. Multiple interviews with status 'Completed' or 'RejectedByHeadquarters' exist and belong to the supervisor's team.
2. Supervisor is logged in.
cases.postconditions: All selected eligible interviews change status to 'ApprovedBySupervisor'.

steps.action: Open the Interviews list on the HQ web interface (as Supervisor). Select multiple completed interviews using the checkboxes.
steps.expected_result: Selection checkboxes are available. 'Approve' and 'Reject' bulk action buttons appear in the toolbar.

steps.action: Click the 'Approve' bulk action button. Confirm the approval dialog showing the count of interviews to be approved.
steps.expected_result: Confirmation dialog shows the number of interviews eligible for supervisor approval (status 'Completed' or 'RejectedByHeadquarters'). After confirmation, all eligible interviews change to 'ApprovedBySupervisor'.

steps.action: Include an already-approved interview in the bulk selection and attempt to approve.
steps.expected_result: The approval dialog correctly shows only the count of interviews that CAN be approved. Interviews not eligible for approval are skipped without error.

cases.title: Supervisor bulk rejects multiple completed interviews
cases.description: Verify that a supervisor can reject multiple completed interviews at once.
cases.preconditions:
1. Multiple interviews with status 'Completed' or 'RejectedByHeadquarters' exist.
2. Supervisor is logged in.
cases.postconditions: All selected eligible interviews change status to 'RejectedBySupervisor'.

steps.action: Select multiple completed interviews and click the 'Reject' bulk action button.
steps.expected_result: A rejection dialog appears showing the number of interviews eligible for rejection and a comment field.

steps.action: Enter a rejection reason and confirm.
steps.expected_result: All eligible interviews change status to 'RejectedBySupervisor'. The comment is applied to each rejected interview.

cases.title: HQ bulk approves multiple interviews
cases.description: Verify that an HQ user can approve multiple interviews (Completed, ApprovedBySupervisor, RejectedBySupervisor) in a single bulk action.
cases.preconditions:
1. Multiple interviews exist with statuses 'Completed', 'ApprovedBySupervisor', and/or 'RejectedBySupervisor'.
2. HQ user is logged in.
cases.postconditions: All eligible interviews change status to 'ApprovedByHeadquarters'.

steps.action: Select multiple interviews with a mix of statuses ('Completed', 'ApprovedBySupervisor', 'RejectedBySupervisor') and click 'Approve'.
steps.expected_result: Confirmation dialog shows the count of interviews eligible for HQ approval. Ineligible interviews (e.g., 'ApprovedByHeadquarters') are excluded from the count.

steps.action: Confirm the approval.
steps.expected_result: All eligible interviews change to 'ApprovedByHeadquarters'. Ineligible ones remain unchanged.

cases.title: HQ bulk rejects multiple interviews to original responsible
cases.description: Verify that an HQ user can reject multiple interviews in a bulk action, sending each back to their original responsible.
cases.preconditions:
1. Multiple interviews with statuses 'Completed' and/or 'ApprovedBySupervisor' exist.
2. HQ user is logged in.
cases.postconditions: All eligible interviews are rejected to their original responsible.

steps.action: Select multiple interviews and click 'Reject'. Choose 'Reject to original responsible' option in the dialog.
steps.expected_result: Confirmation dialog shows the count of eligible interviews for HQ rejection. 'Reject to original responsible' option is selected.

steps.action: Enter a rejection comment and confirm.
steps.expected_result: All eligible interviews are rejected. Each interview is assigned back to its original responsible. The rejection comment is applied to all.

cases.title: HQ bulk rejects multiple interviews to a new responsible
cases.description: Verify that an HQ user can reject multiple interviews to a newly selected responsible person.
cases.preconditions:
1. Multiple interviews exist in rejectable statuses.
2. HQ user is logged in.
cases.postconditions: All eligible interviews are rejected and assigned to the new responsible.

steps.action: Select multiple interviews and click 'Reject'. Select 'Reject to new responsible' and pick a different supervisor or interviewer from the dropdown.
steps.expected_result: The responsible dropdown shows available interviewers/supervisors.

steps.action: Enter a rejection comment and confirm.
steps.expected_result: All eligible interviews are rejected and reassigned to the selected new responsible.

suites.title: Assignment completion tracking
suites.description: Covers how an assignment's completion status and remaining interview count are tracked as interviews are created, completed, and rejected.
suites.preconditions:
1. Headquarters has created an assignment.
2. The assignment has been synchronized to the interviewer.

cases.title: Assignment with quantity=1 is marked complete after 1 interview is created
cases.description: Verify that when an assignment has quantity=1 and one interview has been created from it, the assignment is flagged as completed and no more interviews can be started.
cases.preconditions:
1. An assignment with quantity=1 exists and is assigned to an interviewer.
2. No interviews have been created from this assignment yet.
cases.postconditions: Assignment is in 'Completed' state with 0 interviews needed.

steps.action: On the interviewer app, find the assignment with quantity=1. Note the displayed remaining count.
steps.expected_result: Assignment shows 1 interview remaining.

steps.action: Start a new interview from this assignment.
steps.expected_result: The assignment's remaining interview count decreases to 0. The assignment is no longer available for creating new interviews.

steps.action: Complete the interview and synchronize.
steps.expected_result: On the HQ web interface, the assignment is shown as completed (InterviewsNeeded = 0).

cases.title: Assignment with quantity=2 remains open after 1 interview is created
cases.description: Verify that an assignment with quantity=2 remains available for creating another interview after the first interview is created.
cases.preconditions:
1. An assignment with quantity=2 is assigned to an interviewer.
2. No interviews have been created yet.
cases.postconditions: Assignment has 1 remaining interview slot.

steps.action: On the interviewer app, find the assignment with quantity=2. Start a new interview from this assignment.
steps.expected_result: The assignment remaining count decreases to 1. The assignment is still visible and available for creating another interview.

steps.action: Start a second interview from this assignment.
steps.expected_result: The assignment remaining count decreases to 0. The assignment is no longer available for creating new interviews.

cases.title: Assignment with unlimited quantity never becomes complete
cases.description: Verify that an assignment with no quantity limit (null/unlimited) never shows as completed and the interviewer can always create new interviews from it.
cases.preconditions: 1. An assignment with unlimited quantity (no quantity limit) is assigned to an interviewer.

steps.action: Create several interviews from an unlimited assignment and complete them.
steps.expected_result: The assignment does not disappear or become completed after each interview. The assignment remains available on the interviewer's dashboard for creating additional interviews.

steps.action: On the HQ web interface, check the assignment details.
steps.expected_result: The 'Interviews needed' field shows no limit/unlimited. The assignment is not marked as completed.

cases.title: Rejected interview does not permanently consume an assignment slot
cases.description: Verify that when a completed interview is rejected and re-completed from the same assignment, the assignment completion count is recalculated correctly and does not double-count.
cases.preconditions:
1. An assignment with quantity=1 exists and the interviewer has completed one interview from it.
2. The interview has been synchronized to the server.
cases.postconditions: Assignment completion count reflects the actual number of active interviews (not counting rejected and re-created ones as separate).

steps.action: Supervisor rejects the completed interview back to the interviewer.
steps.expected_result: Interview status is 'RejectedBySupervisor'. Assignment still shows 1 interview created (slot consumed). The interviewer can re-work the existing interview, not start a new one.

steps.action: Interviewer re-completes the rejected interview and syncs.
steps.expected_result: Interview returns to 'Completed' status. The assignment still counts 1 interview used (not 2). Assignment remains completed/consumed (quantity=1, 1 interview created).

cases.title: HQ assignment details page shows correct interview counts
cases.description: Verify that the assignment details page on the HQ web interface correctly shows the number of interviews created, completed, and approved against the assignment quantity.
cases.preconditions:
1. An assignment with a defined quantity has multiple interviews in various statuses.
2. HQ user is logged in.

steps.action: Open the assignment details page on the HQ web interface for an assignment that has interviews in various statuses.
steps.expected_result: The assignment details page shows the total quantity, number of interviews created, and number of interviews remaining. Counts are consistent and accurate.

steps.action: Click through to the list of interviews linked to this assignment.
steps.expected_result: A list of all interviews created from this assignment is shown with their individual statuses.

suites.title: Observer cannot perform approval or rejection actions
suites.description: Verify that a user with Observer role cannot approve, reject, or unapprove any interview, even if they can view them.
suites.preconditions:
1. An Observer user exists and is logged in.
2. Interviews in various statuses exist.

cases.title: Observer cannot approve or reject interviews
cases.description: Verify that the Observer role does not grant the ability to approve or reject interviews.
cases.preconditions:
1. Observer user is logged in.
2. Interviews with actionable statuses (Completed, ApprovedBySupervisor) exist.

steps.action: Log in as an Observer and navigate to the Interviews list.
steps.expected_result: Observer can view the interviews list and open interviews, but 'Approve', 'Reject', and 'Unapprove' buttons are NOT available.

steps.action: Attempt to call the approve API endpoint directly for an interview (e.g., via Postman or browser dev tools).
steps.expected_result: The API returns an authorization error (403 Forbidden or equivalent). No status change occurs.
